idea: Promote all TMA tensor maps to L2_256B while keeping seed geometry shape-aware
justification: Nearby shape f16_1024x8192x8192 kept L2_256B and nanosleep; for low-M this is the least invasive data-grounded adaptation after the baseline seed required shape-fixup.

idea: port dynamic low-M WN128 scheduling from nearby low-M winner
justification: Low-M neighboring shapes improved after switching to the dynamic host/grid form with WN128 scheduling metadata.
